sizing_rule.note: Optimal f calculation using cumulative probability distribution with standard normal values. Requires computing probabilities via running sum methodology with 0.01 step increments, then applying same optimal f procedure as Normal Distribution method. Actual f value not specified in excerpt—must be calculated from trade distribution parameters.

source_rule_text: Use optimal f calculation based on cumulative probability distribution with standard normal values to determine position sizing, following the same procedure as optimal f on the Normal Distribution.
